action.content: Here is a social media post: "My daughter graduated from college today! So proud of her!" Can you make it more exciting? Please make sure to expand it into exactly 2 paragraphs. Separate paragraphs with the markdown divider: ***. Additionally, italicize at least 3 sections by starting and ending with single *, i.e. *italic text*.
action.label: context

action.content:
My heart is absolutely *thrilling* to announce that my daughter has officially *graduated* from college today! This monumental *milestone* marks the culmination of years of hard work, late-night study sessions, and unwavering support from our entire family. Seeing her walk across that stage with such *confidence* and a radiant smile truly *shines* brighter than any spotlight ever could, proving that she is *more than just a student*—she is a future leader and a brilliant human being.

***

The *joy* of this moment is *unmatched*, as we all *know* that this achievement represents the *end* of a long journey and the *beginning* of a new chapter filled with endless possibilities. From the *first day* she arrived to the *final days* of her studies, every single *day* has been filled with lessons that have shaped her character and prepared her for the world ahead. As we celebrate this *victory*, I can't *wait* to see what *exciting* adventures she will embark on next, knowing that her *potential* is limitless and her *dreams* are as big as the stars above us.
action.label: response
